data.title: Metal Logic Purchases Pilbara Site to Deploy Grade-Agnostic, Scalable Modular Clean Steel Smelter
data.description: New modular smelting technology developed in Australia is expected to tap into untapped iron ore resources worth billions, generating employment opportunities in the region and producing affordable, environmentally-friendly steel. The first modules are scheduled for deployment on-site by the end of the first half of the year 2026.

According to Korean media reports, Apple may pursue an aggressive pricing strategy for its foldable iPhone, potentially lowering the expected price from $2,400 to $2,000. In response, Samsung may keep the prices of its next-generation Galaxy foldables, the Z8 series, unchanged.

data.title: transcosmos helps Wacoal build and operate e-commerce websites for Asian markets
data.description: transcosmos has announced its collaboration with Wacoal Holdings Corp., based in Kyoto, Japan, aiming to enhance customer experience and facilitate the brand's worldwide growth. The partnership focuses on implementing a streamlined design and improved operational efficiency. This move is set to boost the brand's global expansion efforts and solidify its presence in the market. The collaboration aims at achieving these objectives by integrating innovative solutions and delivering exceptional services.

data.title: Tom Lee joins Eightco board as the company raises $125M from Bitmine and ARK Invest for new ventures in OpenAI and MrBeast.
data.description: Recent investments from Kraken’s parent company, Ark Invest, and Bitmine have provided substantial funding for Eightco. This supports their strategic decisions to invest in OpenAI and the popular content creator MrBeast. The backing from these sources indicates a significant financial boost amounting to a substantial figure, signaling Eightco’s commitment to expanding their portfolio and making strategic investments in emerging technologies and influential personalities.

data.title: Cymbiotika and Ulta Beauty Announce Partnership, Bringing "Beauty-From-Within" to Over 1,000 Stores Nationwide
data.description: A highly popular wellness company, Cymbiotika, will launch online on March 15 and in physical stores on March 29. Based in San Diego, the brand is renowned for its cutting-edge liposomal delivery methods. The company's foray into the beauty retail sector will commence with its debut at Ulta Beauty.

data.title: Trump To Host Investors Of His Memecoin Again? Mar-A-Lago Gala Luncheon Teased, But Whether The President Will Attend Is A Different Story
data.description: The group behind the Official Trump memecoin revealed plans for a cryptocurrency and business conference at Mar-a-Lago next month, featuring a gala luncheon with President Donald Trump. A special event exclusively for TRUMP holders, promoted on X, is set for April 25 at Trump's Florida property. Only the top 297 TRUMP holders will be chosen to attend. To join, participants need to register by linking their crypto wallet or TRUMP holdings on Robinhood. A real-time leaderboard will track users' average holdings from March 12 to April 10, with the leading 29 holders earning an invite to a VIP reception with Trump. Private meetings with the president will not be offered. The event is on Saturday, April 25 at Mar-a-Lago.
